title: Supply Chain Manager - CMA CGM India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - CMA CGM India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the CMA CGM India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CMA CGM India:
CMA CGM India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMA CGM India!
